item.title: I grew this potassium ferricyanide crystal at home
item.description: Potassium ferricyanide is commonly used in cyanotype printing. Unlike what the name suggests, it's not particularly dangerous. It's also very easy to grow blood red crystals with it! If you wanna find out more, I documented the growth process here: https://crystalverse.com/potassium-ferricyanide-crystals/ While there's not much you can do with the crystal, it does 1) satisfy some primal urge for mineral collecting, and also 2) never fails to impress my friends.
item.dc:creator: crystalchase21

item.title: Liars gonna lie...
item.description: Candace Owens is a psycho-bitch who knocks the "o" right out of "count" but when she's right, she's right. The TPUSA event was a ghost town, as seen in the videos. No one cares about Charlie KKKirk; he was a loud-mouthed community college dropout who preached hate and bigotry. He won't be missed, not even by his wife.
item.dc:creator: ChromePlatedEquator

item.title: Guitar
item.description:
More Simone! I am really burnt out, but I'm trying hard to make new art! Incase you don't know the story: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! Behind the scenes/pinup: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
Some sketches while figuring out her expressions. Want to have a clean expression sheet soon!
More Simone! I am really burnt out, but I'm trying hard to make new art! Incase you don't know the story: New OC Simone! She is the lead singer in her band. After she and her band finally get their big break and sign with a label, they are introduced to the other newly signed group, only to discover that their lead singer is her ex-boyfriend. MORE CHARACTERS COMING SOON! Behind the scenes/pinup: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.dc:creator: UpNorthAndFreezing

item.title: GovBrief Today #439
item.description: Donald Trump pardoned over 1,000 January 6 insurrectionists on his first day in office but wouldn't forgive the extremist organizers behind the seditious conspiracy. His Justice Department asked a court today to entirely erase their convictions. The last time we forgave insurrectionists who attacked us, we spent 161 years subsidizing their memorial societies and watching Lost Cause mythology settle into school textbooks. In Virginia, Governor Abigail Spanberger signed a bill this week to finally end those tax breaks. Now a court is being asked to start the cycle over. The Republican Party has spent five years insisting that the people who beat police officers with flagpoles and sprayed them with chemicals on live television were not attacking the Capitol. They called it a day of love. This November, vote for people who refuse to rewrite history to protect themselves and who will give consequences to the people who try to hurt us. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 439 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website (embedded links, data, image): https://go.govbrief.today/260414-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/colorado-aid-denied [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-meloni [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr14 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/tariff-refunds-monday [5] https://go.govbrief.today/warsh-wealth [6] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-51 [7] https://go.govbrief.today/proud-oath-dismiss [8] https://go.govbrief.today/surprise-fed [9] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-prosecutors-fired [10] https://go.govbrief.today/contempt-blocked [11] https://go.govbrief.today/pulte-defamation [12] https://go.govbrief.today/kentucky-veto-override [13] https://go.govbrief.today/hernandez-charged [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gregg-teleport-halt [15] https://go.govbrief.today/spanberger-confederacy-tax [16] https://go.govbrief.today/johnson-ai-jesus [17] https://go.govbrief.today/maine-center-ban Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Hannah Waddingham Wednesday
item.dc:creator: taez555

item.title: Marvel just fired its entire visual development staff
item.description:
Disney continues being Disney. Same as they've been for a hundred years, passionately disrespecting labor.
https://www.forbes.com/sites/robsalkowitz/2026/04/14/disney-layoffs-hit-marvel-studios-hard/ Important to note that rather than this being totally AI job replacement related (it's guaranteed to be at least partially responsible, but lol as if they'd admit that), it's mostly part of a trend in the entertainment industry of firing staff and then only bringing them back in on temporary contracts. Don't have to pay residuals to temps after all.
item.dc:creator: ipointoutnahtzeesbyreplyingtothem

item.title: Funny how the mass murderer gets a plea deal to avoid execution
item.description: The DOJ (Trump's law firm) has been pushing the courts to have Luigi Mangione executed for his crime. Thankfully, that has been blocked. But they keep trying. Mass murderer of 23 people in Walmart, though? He gets offered a plea deal to avoid the death penalty.
item.dc:creator: cytherians
